title: Bundle of Spontex Catch & Clean Rubber Broom and Dustpan Set + 8 Multi-purpose Microfibers + General Purpose Sponge Scourer (Pack of 6) + 100 Multi-Purpose Disposable Gloves
features: 2x MORE EFFICIENT: Versatile rubber broom and dustpan set is 2X more efficient than a traditional bristle broom, with V shaped blade bristles that pick up all types of wet and dry dirt, as well as pet hair and food
Multi-purpose cleaning cloths that easily remove dirt and grease
Efficient, professional products designed to cater for all business cleaning needs.
Offers protection from smells and stains
WORKS ON EVERY SURFACE: Rubber brush effectively gathers dirt on all surfaces including tiles, laminate, wood, stone and even rugs, carpets and mats
Greater absorption capacity and ease of removing dust, as it is made of microfiber
Easy fit and versatile for everyday tasks

REACHES TOUGH SPACES: Adjustable broom head can be positioned at 4 different angles to clean hard-to-reach areas, even under low furniture, making cleaning quicker and easier; step-on dustpan collects dirt and dust without having to bend down
They guarantee the saving of money, time and effort when cleaning the house
description: All the essentials needed for heading to university
